nodes.itemHTML: • Noisli (iOS, Android, Web, Chrome): free mixing of multiple tracks (which is similar to Soundrown but with much better UI). Users can save a customized setting for later use. I personally think this one has better fire sound tracks than soundrown.
• Official Blog
• Securing DevOps - A book on utilizing CI/CD techniques to improve the security of web applications and their infrastructure.

• mig - MIG is a platform to perform investigative surgery on remote endpoints. It enables investigators to obtain information from large numbers of systems in parallel, thus accelerating investigation of incidents and day-to-day operations security.

• Web Markup Minifierstars316 - .NET library that contains a set of markup minifiers. The objective of this project is to improve the performance of web applications by reducing the size of HTML, XHTML and XML code.
• Pythonstars14.7k
• Coding WebIDEstars1.6k - The Coding WebIDE Community Edition project
• PotPlayer - Multimedia player with a wide collection of codecs which also offers extensive configuration options for users.
• Facebook - Group for discussions, articles and knowledge sharing
• Angular Work
• Behance
• Jobs for Designers
• UX Jobs Board
• Landing.jobs
• Github Organization - Official GitHub organization for D. Repo for all official D tools & code.
• D Programming Language - Official Organization, hosts DMD, Phobos and other official tools and libs.
• dubstars548 - Official package and build management system for D.

• dmdstars2.4k - The reference compiler for the D programming language. Stable, builds insanely fast, very good for learning and rapid prototyping/development. Currently the frontend is implemented in D, and shared between dmd, ldc and gdc, the backend is implemented in C++.
• dubstars548 - De facto official package and build management system for D. Will be included officially soon.
• Visual Dstars257 - Visual Studio extension for the D programming language.
• Wargusstars187 - Wargus is a Warcraft2 Mod that allows you to play Warcraft2 with the Stratagus engine.
• RubyNow
• Jintstars2.2k - JavaScript interpreter for .NET which provides full ECMA 5.1 compliance and can run on any .NET platform.
• Jurassicstars609 - A implementation of the ECMAScript language and runtime. It aims to provide the best performing and most standards-compliant implementation of JavaScript for .NET.
• Do we need better prototyping or simpler coding? - Written by Daniel Hollick.
• Fuse Foreign Speech - Written by Remi Pedersen.
• A sane way of mixing languages in Fuse - Written by Chris Bagley.
• How Fuse differs from React Native and NativeScript - Written by Remi Pedersen.
• Medium - Articles on Medium by the core team.
• Hikrstars42 - An example app case to accompany Fuse's end-to-end tutorial.
• Samplesstars179 - Samples demonstrating the use of various Fuse and FuseJS APIs.

• Features Status - List of current and upcoming Fuse features.
• Developer Guides - Getting up and running with Fuse is super easy.
• Examples - A list of examples create by Fuse.
• Packages - A curated list of third party Fuse packages created by the community.
• YouTube - Official Fuse YouTube channel.
• ncw/rclone 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥stars27.2k - Rsync for various cloud storage providers such as S3.
• ImageResizer - Add commands to image URLs to get altered versions in milliseconds. Resizing, editing etc of images in real-time.
• Go In 5 Minutes - 5 minute screencasts focused on getting one thing done.
• Getting Started with TensorFlow - Get up and running with the latest numerical computing library by Google and dive deeper into your data, by Giancarlo Zaccone
• Qiscus SDKstars178 - Qiscus SDK is a lightweight and powerful android chat library. Qiscus SDK will allow you to easily integrating Qiscus engine with your apps to make cool chatting application.
• HTML5 Apps: Positioning with Geolocation
• Demythstifying Web Components
• Real-World Off-Line Data Storage
• PhoneGap from Scratch
• HTML5 Vibration API
• HTML5 Battery Status API
• HTML5 Network Information API
• Getting started with Web Workers
• elixir-tmbundlestars250 - A TextMate and SublimeText bundle for Elixir.
• Hoa Project - Another package of PHP components.
• Patchwork - A library for redefining userland functions.
• Robostars2.4k - A PHP Task runner with object-orientated configurations.
• PHP-Mockstars300 - A mock library for built-in PHP functions (e.g. time()).
• MIT OpenCourseWare Lectures on Linear Algebra (18.06) as Jupyter Notebooksstars410 - Juan Klopper
• Snappy - A fast compressor/decompressor. [BSD]

• AM 207 Monte Carlo Methods and Stochastic Optimization Harvard University
    • This course introduces important principles of Monte Carlo techniques and demonstrates the power of these techniques with simple (but very useful) applications. All of this in Python!
    • Lecture Videos
    • Assignments
    • Lecture Notes

• graphql-batchstars1.2k - A query batching executor for the graphql gem.

• Love DevOps? Wait 'till you meet SRE [video]
• Streaming Data - Streaming Data introduces the concepts and requirements of streaming and real-time data systems.
• Storm Applied - Storm Applied is a practical guide to using Apache Storm for the real-world tasks associated with processing and analyzing real-time data streams.

• Fundamentals of Stream Processing: Application Design, Systems, and Analytics - This comprehensive, hands-on guide combining the fundamental building blocks and emerging research in stream processing is ideal for application designers, system builders, analytic developers, as well as students and researchers in the field.
• Stream Data Processing: A Quality of Service Perspective - Presents a new paradigm suitable for stream and complex event processing.
• South Bay Site Reliability Engineering (Sunnyvale, CA) Meetup - A Group For Individuals Who Tackle Reliability Challenges For Web-Scale Systems.
• Site Reliability Engineering with Stephen Weinberg
• Parseystars52 - Parser combinator framework that supports source location tracking, backtracking prevention, and rich error messages.
• The infinite hows
• Failure is Always An Option: How a Blameless Culture Leads to Better Results
• SRE, noun. See also: confidence, trust.
• Dickerson's Hierarchy of Reliability

• Constructstars260 - A PHP project/micro-package generator.
• pipe_tostars76 - The enhanced pipe operator which can specify the target position.
• faker_elixirstars147 - FakerElixir is an Elixir package that generates fake data for you.

• RBMQstars19 - Simple API for spawning RabbitMQ Producers and Consumers.
• doormanstars113 - Tools to make Elixir authentication simple and flexible.
• pitrery - pitrery is a set of Bash scripts to manage Point In Time Recovery (PITR) backups for PostgreSQL.
• Monga pluginstars18 - Provides access to MongoDB datasource using thephpleague/monga.
• Vertx-Webstars873 - Vert.x-Web is a set of building blocks for building web applications with Vert.x, a toolkit for building reactive applications on the JVM.

• Building Progressive Web Apps - O'Reilly - A hands-on guide and reference for service workers, caching strategies, push notifications, and more. Everything you need to build a modern progressive web app.
• Offline Web Applications Using IndexedDB & Service Worker - A great Udacity course introducing service workers and IndexedDB.
• Designing Offline-First Web Apps - A fascinating look at design and UX considerations for dealing with various states of connectivity.
• Installing Hubot on Windows with PowerShell DSC - Using the Hubot PowerShell Desired State Configuration (DSC) resource to install Hubot on Windows.
• Codecasts #2 - Falando Sobre Vuejs e Web Components (2016-08-19) [pt-BR]
• Active Directory (by water) - Extensive library to control and manipulate the Windows active directory. Link to the documentation pages.
• GTK+ (by prazetto) - GTK+ Framework | Widgets.
• IUIAutomation MS framework (by junkew) - IUIAutomation MS framework to automate chrome, FF, IE etc.
